steps.signal: MOLT appeared at rank 4/10 on Base trending — stable for 5 consecutive 30-min cycles (4→4→4→4→4). 574 onchain transactions in 24h, $1.9M liquidity.
48h hourly price history via Alchemy Prices API: +7.4% last hour, +6.3% last 6h, +35.9% last 24h. Move completion: only 25% of the 24h move happened in the last 6h — still early.
24h wallet-level activity via Alchemy Transfers API: 44 unique buyers vs 39 unique sellers. Buy ratio 0.57 — more wallets accumulating than distributing.
Composite score 0.73/1.0. Components: where-in-move (25% done = high) × rank stability × momentum quality (+7.4% last hour) × volume conviction × buyer acceleration.

Confidence 70%. Reasoning: strong trend with only 25% of move done, buy ratio and unique buyer count suggest bullish accumulation. Low market cap ($2.8M) increases upside potential. Bear regime acknowledged — sized conservatively at $12.

decision.reasoning: Strong trend, only 25% of move done, 44 unique buyers outnumber sellers, low mcap. Bear regime warrants conservative $12 size with 5% trailing stop.
